title: ononis serrata var. marmorata
intro: Ononis serrata var. marmorata, also known as the marmorated spiny restharrow, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, and to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Ononis serrata var. marmorata include its potential to help reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, and support the digestive system, among other benefits. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various modes of consumption and application.
